rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.27+commit.40a35a09"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"GridMath","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"All mathematical primitives for the xStocks Grid prediction market. MATHEMATICAL FOUNDATION ======================= Stock prices follow Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM):   dS = \u03bcS dt + \u03c3S dW Over short intervals the log-return is normally distributed:   ln(S_T / S_0) ~ N(\u03bcT, \u03c3\u00b2T) Probability of price TOUCHING level L within time T (barrier semantics):   P = 2 \u00b7 \u03a6(-|d|)   where d = (L - S\u2080) / (S\u2080 \u00b7 \u03c3 \u00b7 \u221aT)  [linear approx for small moves]   \u03a6 = cumulative standard normal distribution Fair multiplier (before house edge):   mult_fair = 1 / P Displayed multiplier (after house edge h):   mult_display = mult_fair \u00d7 (1 - h) VOLATILITY SCALING ================== Annual \u03c3 \u2192 per-bucket \u03c3:   \u03c3_bucket = \u03c3_annual \u00d7 \u221a(bucket_seconds / SECONDS_PER_YEAR) Market-hours vol adjustments (from Tivnan et al.):   - First 30 min after open: \u00d72.5 (dislocation rate spike)   - Normal hours:            \u00d71.0   - Last 30 min before close:\u00d71.8   - Pre/after market:        \u00d70.4   - Weekend/closed:          \u00d70.2 Higher effective vol \u2192 lower multipliers (price more likely to reach target).","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"GridMath.sol":"GridMath"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"GridMath.sol":{"keccak256":"0x0f3de43927ccb4bfdb6723586c38ced08697f1baf7a1ffcd8abd593694d4094d","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://900ab6c464dd508ee0676f35232437f0742cc0dc4a186d8ddb884cbb3e9e7570","dweb:/ipfs/QmdDk9ahG37RMmLDHV7Gtow6Jq8nrGAk2JHUWgFyM78ren"]}},"version":1}
